channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: There are lots of brambles that are pushing against the fence by rear of 88 sandyleaze which is on sandyleaze playing fields, 12th May
item.description:
Email of 9/5/26 2012 hours - Please can you cut back the bramble as it is damaging the fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandyleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on bank of horsbere brook, 12th May
item.description:
Metal pole and wire fencing dumped on the bank of horsbere brook. There are also other smaller items and a lot of rubbish around the banks of the brook and in the brook itself. There is also a concrete post and slabs in the brook itself which was reported by someone in November 2025 and is still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Walk, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Overgrown grass on main road , hedge severely overgrown. Blocking light into houses. Trees overgrown & overhanging blocking light, 12th May
item.description:
Outside houses on Pirton lane 58-62 & tress down side of 62
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58,60,62, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 12th May
item.description:
Depression CW ENWD 1200mm x 500mm x 70mm 2 way traffic lights TM Unmarked sizes approximate unsafe to measure (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 12th May
item.description:
Depression CW 1200mm x 500mm x 70mm 2 way traffic lights TM Unmarked sizes approximate unsafe to measure Permanent Repair (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 12th May
item.description:
Cway kerb 1 x 6x4 edging kerb TU and replace STAT PLAN REQUIRED STANDARD TM REQUIRED (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 12th May
item.description:
Broken cover & frame 1 x 600mm x 600mm Highway CI cover - rattling Please take up and investigate STAT PLAN REQUIRED 2 way traffic lights TM required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate is damaged/missing/locked problem, 12th May
item.description:
I wonder if you could let your Bridle Path team leader know that there is a broken timber gate post on the Bridlepath.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post is an obstruction and is redundant, 12th May
item.description:
Redundant obstructing post is on the pavement outside 234 Gloucester Road. I have damaged my car door on it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 232, Gloucester Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) (Non illuminating bollard or post)
